patterns: When will I receive my package
responses: 📦 Standard shipping usually takes **3-5 business days**. You can track your order using the link in your confirmation email.
Orders are typically processed within 24 hours and shipped within 3-5 days. Expedited options are available at checkout!
We offer a **30-day hassle-free return policy**. Please visit our Returns center on the website for a printable label.
You can return or exchange most items within 30 days of receipt. Make sure the item is unused and in original packaging. ♻️
